scripts.dev: bash scripts/ensure-cluster.sh && bash scripts/ensure-temporal.sh && bash scripts/ensure-mongo.sh && concurrently --kill-others "npm run dev -w apps/backend" "npm run dev -w apps/frontend" "npm run dev:worker -w apps/backend" "npm run dev:worker:cluster -w apps/backend"
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:e2e:sync
scripts.test:all: npm test && npm run test:infra:integration && npm run test:unit:vpn
scripts.test:unit: npm run test:unit:frontend && npm run test:unit:backend
scripts.test:e2e:sync: npm run test:alive && npm run test:unit && npm run test:test:e2e:setup && npx playwright test tests/e2e.spec.ts && npm run test:test:e2e:teardown
scripts.test:e2e: npm run test:alive && npm run test:test:e2e:setup && npx playwright test e2e && npm run test:test:e2e:teardown
